name: Auditing the Risk Claims of Distributional Reinforcement Learning

description: arXiv:2607.11607v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Distributional reinforcement learning agents learn full return distributions that are increasingly read at face value: for interpretability, risk-sensitive control, and safety monitoring. We ask a question theory anticipates but that has not been measured directly: are the risk claims of a trained distributional agent true? Our audit combines a de...
author: Hari Prasad
